ontologysync-desc: Connects MediaWiki wikis to the Labki ontology via SMW's content importer
ontologysync-managed-footer: This page is managed by OntologySync. Manual edits may be overwritten on the next ontology update.
ontologysync-error-no-repopath: $wgOntologySyncRepoPath is not configured. Set it to a local filesystem path where the ontology repository should be cloned.
ontologysync-repo-not-cloned: The ontology repository has not been cloned yet. Click Clone to download it.
ontologysync-no-bundles-in-repo: No bundles found in the repository.
ontologysync-browse-intro: Explore available bundles and modules in the ontology repository.
ontologysync-install-intro: Install or update ontology bundles from the repository.
ontologysync-pages-intro: Pages managed by OntologySync with edit detection status.
ontologysync-preview-guidance:
How this works:
  1. Click Prepare Import to stage the bundle files.
  2. Run php maintenance/run.php update --quick on the server to import the pages.
  3. Run php maintenance/run.php "MediaWiki\Extension\OntologySync\Maintenance\RecordStagedImports" to finalize.
ontologysync-staged-banner:
Bundle $1 v$2 is staged for import. Run these commands on the server:
php maintenance/run.php update --quick
php maintenance/run.php "MediaWiki\Extension\OntologySync\Maintenance\RecordStagedImports"
ontologysync-no-managed-pages: No pages are currently managed by OntologySync.
ontologysync-clone-failed: Failed to clone the repository. Check the server log for details.
ontologysync-pull-failed: Failed to pull updates. Check the server log for details.
